notes.text: New setting 'enableEnlargeImage' to enable lightbox for avatar
We've resolved an issue with the visibility of subsections by setting the binding context to null or undefined
You can now enable and disable the showShareInWorkzone property in the manifest.json file
We no longer use a menu button but now display the ‘Save and Back’ button separately next to the ‘Save’ button
You can now enable and disable the shareAsTile property in the manifest.json file
We now ensure that custom columns that contain numbers are correctly exported
We've resolved an issue with the loading of object pages by using the requestValue method
